title: DfE update 12 November 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Information Publication of the updated college oversight policy   Your feedback Further education workforce survey     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Action Academies land and building collection tool form is now live   Information Helping schools find better banking options and getting the best from your rates   Your feedback Join our user research panel to improve services for schools   Your feedback Help make buying school management information system software easier   Events and webinars Academies chart of accounts and automation question and answer drop-in session   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement (DfE’s alternative to commercial insurance) webinar   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only – accident investigation (near misses) workshop   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Financial Benchmarking Insights Tool webinar   Events and webinars Academies chart of accounts and automation question and answer drop-in session   Events and webinars Banking for schools webinar     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Information Helping schools find better banking options and getting the best from your rates   Your feedback Join our user research panel to improve services for schools   Your feedback Help make buying school management information system software easier   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement (DfE’s alternative to commercial insurance) webinar   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only – accident investigation (near misses) workshop   Events and webinars Financial Benchmarking Insights Tool webinar   Events and webinars Banking for schools webinar    "
